full_text:
Wei Hong 衛弘
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Hong (衛弘). Of a wealthy family, he gave his property to Cao Cao to raise troops to restore the Han. Wei Hong is a fictional character. Wei Hong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
